title: Willem van Oranje
writer: H.J. Drayer, Jan Teunissen, G. van Gelder
actors: Cor Van der Lugt Melsert, Louise Kooiman, Willy Haak
plot: The story of William of Orange is told in a series of short episodes, spanning his sudden rise to prince of Orange in 1544, his role during the Eighty Years War to his murder by Balthasar Gerards in 1584.
